chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No.S- 1076 of 2018 Priority case 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA No.7121/2018 (S/A) 04.03.2019 Mr. Maqsood Ahmed Leghari Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Abdul Rehman Kolachi, DPG for State Private respondent in person >>>>>>>...<<<<<<<< Heard. 2. The applicant by way of instant criminal miscellaneous application under Section 561-A, Cr.P.C has impugned order dated 10.12.2018 passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace/ 1st Additional Sessions Judge Sukkur, on application under Section 22-A(i)(b) Cr.P.C, whereby he has directed SHO Police Station Abad to record statement of the private respondent under Section 154 Cr.P.C 3. SHO Police Station Abad has submitted his written reply/statement, wherein it is stated by him that FIR of the incident has already been recorded on 08.02.2019 (Crime No.27/2019 of P.S Abad). 4. After recording of FIR of the incident, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application has become infructuous, it is disposed of accordingly along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
